findings.title: Production Build Success
findings.description: The project now builds successfully in production mode. Critical type errors in ComplianceChecker and SafetyRiskQuiz were resolved.

findings.title: Remaining Lint Warnings
findings.description: 30 warnings remaining (unused variables), but 0 errors. Quality gate is green.

findings.title: Scrolling Performance
findings.description: Double Lenis instantiation removed. Smooth scrolling is stable and unified.

findings.title: Canonical Routing Alignment
findings.description: Initialized configs/orchestrator/router.yaml and models.yaml to align with v4 standards.
